content: agent2: added 'separator' param to make_attrgetter, _prepare_attribute_parts, sync_do_groupby, and do_groupby in src/jinja2/filters.py (default '.', backward compatible). Diff already applied to shared working dir. Signatures now: sync_do_groupby(environment, value, attribute, default=None, separator='.') and do_groupby(...) same. Please add your 'reverse' param on top of my current version (git diff already staged) rather than overwriting - just add 'reverse: bool = False' as another kwarg and use it in the sorted()/groupby() calls. Let me know if you want me to hold off on running tests/submitting patch.txt until you're done editing this file.
